message:
test(polynomial): lock Chebyshev root-finding parity (chebroots)

Added 7 goldens for np.polynomial.chebyshev.chebroots, which had only
one case. Covers:
- T1(x) = x → root at 0
- T2(x) = 2x²-1 → roots ±1/√2
- T3(x) = 4x³-3x → roots 0, ±√3/2
- chebfromroots round-trip for {-1,0,1}, {0.25,0.5,0.75},
  {-0.3,0,0.3,0.6}
- T0+T1 = 1+x → root -1 (trivial linear shift)

Note: polynomial_differential_suite_is_green is pre-existing red on
HEAD due to an unrelated polyder_constant_zero fixture/impl mismatch;
verified by running the suite against HEAD with these additions
stashed. Not introduced here.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
